title: [FIRRTL] Non-local Instance Port Annotations Fail to Parse/Scatter
body:
Parsing/scattering of non-local annotations (NLAs) that target an instance port are currently broken.

Consider the following:

```scala
circuit Foo: %[[
  {"class":"hello","target":"~Foo|Foo/bar:Bar>baz.a"}
]]
  module Baz:
    output a: UInt<1>
    a is invalid

  module Bar:
    inst baz of Baz

  module Foo:
    inst bar of Bar
```

This is producing:

```
Foo.fir:1:1: error: 'firrtl.hierpath' op  operation with symbol: #hw.innerNameRef<@Bar::@baz> was not found 
circuit Foo: %[[
^
Foo.fir:1:1: note: see current operation: "firrtl.hierpath"() {namepath = [#hw.innerNameRef<@Foo::@bar>, #hw.innerNameRef<@Bar::@baz>], sym_name = "nla_1"} : () -> ()
```

It looks like this is not producing the `@baz` symbol on the instance.
